title: CLOTHES FOR THE WHOLE FAMILY - 211info
text: SNOWCAP'S CLOTHING PROGRAM CLOTHES FOR THE WHOLE FAMILY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a clothing closet with gently used clothing. Also offers diapers. Supplies are limited and dependent on donations. 21655 SE Stark Street Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: -Clothing closet: Low-income households; people may visit the clothing closet once a month -Diapers: Age 2 and under Hours: Tuesday-Thursday by appointment only. Same day appointments may be available. Email (503) 674-8785 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 674-8785 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to submit a request form or call to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus line #20 Services: Baby Clothing Children's Clothing Diapers General Clothing Provision If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
